Footer.desc: The first digital platform for the Haitian automotive sector.
Footer.support_fr_ht_en: Customer assistance available in French, Haitian Creole, and English.
Footer.verified_network: A verified network of garages and parts providers for a more reliable journey.
Footer.smart_guidance: Clear guidance between diagnosis, compatible parts, and appointment booking.

HomePage.subtitle: Find a certified garage, order your car parts, manage your maintenance and consult
HomePage.subtitle_end: — your AI automotive assistant — all in one.
HomePage.panel_vehicle_detail: Maintenance history, parts compatibility, and reminders centralized in one place.
HomePage.panel_service_detail: Prepare the intervention, compare available options, and book with a certified garage.
HomePage.panel_metric_one_label: to confirm an intervention or order
HomePage.panel_metric_two_label: to follow garages, parts, and assistance

Features.subtitle: AUTONORME brings garages, auto parts, and artificial intelligence together to transform your automotive experience in Haiti.
Features.garage_description: Access 200+ certified garages across Haiti. Geolocation, specialties, customer reviews, and online booking.
Features.parts_description: More than 5,000 parts available. Automatic compatibility check with your vehicle and real-time stock.
Features.autobot_description: Your intelligent automotive assistant in French, Haitian Creole, and English. Advice, diagnostics, and personalized recommendations.

Stats.title: AUTONORME is growing fast
Stats.subtitle: Growth driven by the trust of Haitian drivers and professionals.

AutoBotPreview.title: AutoBot helps you decide faster and with more confidence.
AutoBotPreview.body: Rather than a simple chat demo, AutoBot acts as a journey advisor. It helps qualify a problem, suggests suitable parts, and prepares the next step with a trusted garage.
AutoBotPreview.benefit_1_desc: Describe the symptom or service you need to get clear direction before spending.
AutoBotPreview.benefit_2_desc: Receive recommendations aligned with your vehicle, your budget, and local availability.
AutoBotPreview.benefit_3_desc: Continue naturally toward a garage, a parts order, or an appointment booking.
AutoBotPreview.scenario_title: Brake noise on a 2020 Toyota Corolla
AutoBotPreview.scenario_text: AutoBot identifies what to check, explains likely options, and prepares the useful references before the garage visit.
AutoBotPreview.next_step_text: Once the right option is selected, AutoBot can direct the customer to the right garage and prepare the appointment with the context already summarized.

HomeCTA.title: A platform designed to reassure drivers, from first diagnosis to final appointment.
HomeCTA.subtitle: Create your space, find certified garages, verify your parts, and keep better control over your vehicle maintenance.
HomeCTA.proof_1: A clear journey between need, part, and intervention
HomeCTA.proof_2: Multilingual access built for the Haitian market
HomeCTA.proof_3: A serious foundation to modernize automotive service

Garages.title: Partner Garages
Garages.subtitle: Find a trusted garage near you, certified to AUTONORME quality standards.
Garages.highlight_1: Search by city, neighborhood, or specialty
Garages.results_hint: Refine by area or by service needed
Garages.load_error: Unable to load garages right now. Check your connection and try again.
Garages.empty_search: Try another neighborhood, specialty, or garage name.
Garages.empty_default: The directory is currently being updated for your area.
Garages.description_fallback: Detailed information is available on the garage profile.
Garages.map_placeholder: The interactive map will be displayed here.
Garages.trust_panel_desc: For the Haitian market, the most important thing is to know whether the garage is reachable, verified, and relevant to your need. This page helps you decide faster.
Garages.trust_item_1_desc: Match the listed expertise with your need before calling or traveling.
Garages.trust_item_2_desc: Prioritize garages with a visible phone number to save time when traffic or distance matters.
Garages.trust_item_3_desc: Once the right garage is identified, sign in to prepare a cleaner appointment request.
Garages.specialties_fallback: This garage's specialties have not been specified yet.
Garages.detail_description_fallback: This garage is listed in the AUTONORME network. Detailed information is still being enriched.
Garages.book_desc: Select a date and a reason to book an appointment with this garage. Confirmation is immediate.

Parts.title: AUTOparts Catalog
Parts.subtitle: Buy guaranteed spare parts for your vehicle. Delivery anywhere in Haiti.
Parts.highlight_2: Quick reading by category and reference
Parts.search_placeholder: Search for a part, a brand...
Parts.results_hint: Start with a reference, brand, or category
Parts.load_error: Unable to load the catalog right now. Check your connection and try again.
Parts.empty_search: Try another reference, brand, or category.
Parts.empty_default: The catalog is currently being updated for this selection.
Parts.detail_description: This page gathers the information currently available in the AUTONORME catalog: supplier, stock location, availability, and known compatible vehicles.
Parts.compatibility_fallback: Compatible vehicles have not been specified yet for this part.
Parts.compatibility_note: Detailed compatibility verification currently requires signing in to a customer account.

AutoBot.title: AutoBot AI Assistant
AutoBot.subtitle: Ask questions about mechanics, find parts or book an appointment naturally.
AutoBot.hero_title: AutoBot, to clarify before you act.
AutoBot.hero_subtitle: Ask a question about a breakdown, a part, or a garage. AutoBot uses the AUTONORME framework to guide the exchange and help you prepare the right next step.
AutoBot.welcome: Hello. I am AutoBot, the AUTONORME assistant. I can help explain a symptom, locate a part, or prepare a garage search. Just tell me what you need.
AutoBot.assist_desc: AutoBot is more useful when you describe the concrete need: symptom, vehicle, city, or type of part. The goal is to guide you cleanly, not to replace a full diagnosis.
AutoBot.guide_1_title: Start with the symptom or the part
AutoBot.guide_1_desc: Example: brake noise, weak battery, shock absorber, alternator, oil filter.
AutoBot.guide_2_desc: Make, model, and year help AutoBot stay relevant without wasting your time.
AutoBot.guide_3_title: Specify the city if you need a garage
AutoBot.guide_3_desc: In Haiti, area and neighborhood matter a lot before deciding to travel.
AutoBot.prompt_desc: You can start with a simple request and let AutoBot refine the rest with you.
AutoBot.prompt_1: I need brake pads for a 2020 Toyota Corolla.
AutoBot.prompt_2: I am in Delmas and I need a garage for a diagnostic.
AutoBot.prompt_3: My battery drains quickly. Where should I start?
AutoBot.network_error: I can't reach AutoBot right now. Please check your connection and try again.
AutoBot.disclaimer: AutoBot can make mistakes. Always verify important information before a repair or purchase.
